_comment: Canonical, machine-readable inventory of YHA's EXTERNAL / system dependencies — the things that live outside the bun/go package trees (container runtime, CLI binaries, API keys, Python venvs). The human-readable companion is DEPENDENCIES.md (§1-§8); keep the two in sync. The bridge scanner (bridge/lib/deps.ts → GET /v1/system/deps, surfaced in Preferences -> Dependencies) probes every entry below for live present/missing status, and MCP/core code calls deps.assertDep(id) so a missing dep fails with an actionable message instead of a raw spawn error.

detectKinds.binary: Found on PATH (PATHEXT-aware on Windows), or at an explicit `paths` candidate, or at the absolute path held in `configPath` (dotted key into config.json) / `envPath` (env var). `altNames` are alternate executable names that satisfy the same need. `versionArgs` (optional) are run once, when found, to capture a version string.
detectKinds.env: Present when any name in `names` is set to a non-empty value in the process environment or bridge/.env. Only the matched NAME is ever reported — never the secret value.
detectKinds.path: A file/dir that must exist. `path` is ~-expanded and, when relative, resolved against the repo root. `envOverride` lets an env var relocate it.
detectKinds.port: A TCP port that must accept a connection on `host` (default 127.0.0.1).

dependencies.label: Bun
requiredBy: all 19 MCP servers (every one is launched via `bun`)
dependencies.installHint: https://bun.sh — `engines.bun` requires >= 1.2

dependencies.label: Go toolchain
dependencies.installHint: https://go.dev/dl — go-core/go.mod requires >= 1.25

dependencies.label: Python 3
dependencies.installHint: 3.x. Note: very new releases (3.14) may lack prebuilt wheels for graphifyy / google libs.

dependencies.label: Git
dependencies.installHint: https://git-scm.com — Git for Windows also supplies unzip/nice

dependencies.label: Node.js
dependencies.installHint: Optional — Bun covers the JS runtime for normal operation.

dependencies.label: Container runtime (Docker/Podman)
dependencies.installHint: Docker Desktop, Podman, or Docker-in-WSL — AND author the two images `my-python-app` & `my-nodejs-app` (no Dockerfiles in repo). Only code-exec needs this; the Windows browser path does not.

dependencies.label: Claude CLI
dependencies.installHint: Config-pathed (CLAUDE_BIN / config.defaults.claudeBin) — already running if you can read this.

dependencies.label: Codex CLI
dependencies.installHint: OpenAI Codex CLI (config-pathed via CODEX_BIN).

dependencies.label: Grok CLI
dependencies.installHint: Grok CLI / OAuth (~/.grok).

dependencies.label: Tailscale
dependencies.installHint: https://tailscale.com/download

dependencies.label: GitHub CLI
dependencies.installHint: https://cli.github.com

dependencies.label: ripgrep
dependencies.installHint: winget install BurntSushi.ripgrep.MSVC (Go Grep degrades gracefully without it).

dependencies.label: FFmpeg
dependencies.installHint: winget install Gyan.FFmpeg

dependencies.label: rclone
dependencies.installHint: https://rclone.org/downloads

dependencies.label: notebooklm CLI
dependencies.installHint: External Python-venv CLI; set config.defaults.notebooklm_bin to its path.

dependencies.label: unzip
dependencies.installHint: Bundled with Git for Windows (usr/bin).

dependencies.label: zip
dependencies.installHint: Git for Windows ships unzip but NOT zip; archive-create may fail on Windows.

dependencies.label: OpenAI API key
dependencies.installHint: Set OPENAI_API_KEY in bridge/.env or add an OpenAI provider in config.json.

dependencies.label: Google API key
dependencies.installHint: Set GOOGLE_API_KEY in bridge/.env or add a Google provider.

dependencies.label: xAI / Grok API key
dependencies.installHint: Set XAI_API_KEY, or rely on the grok CLI OAuth session.

dependencies.label: Tavily search key
dependencies.installHint: Optional — websearch falls back to free DuckDuckGo/Brave without it.

dependencies.label: Exa search key
dependencies.installHint: Optional secondary websearch provider.

dependencies.label: NVIDIA NIM key
dependencies.installHint: https://build.nvidia.com/settings/api-keys

dependencies.label: Anthropic API key
dependencies.installHint: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. The interactive harness uses the claude CLI session instead.

dependencies.label: Graphify Python venv
dependencies.installHint: Self-bootstraps on first use (python3 -m venv + pip install graphifyy==0.7.0); also needs rg.

dependencies.label: Hermes skills directory
dependencies.installHint: Import skills via the hermeshub skill to populate ~/.hermes/skills.
